lessons: Visible structural health checks and Public LB performance are separate signals.
Increasing rank near higher SVD error locations does not necessarily improve Public LB.
Nearby asymmetric gate/x split variants are not worth additional submissions at this point.

hold_or_reject_related_experiments.reason: 15/17 regressed below Golden Baseline despite passing structure diagnostics.
Rank/SVD surgery is considered high LB-risk after this regression.
Further in-projection redistribution is paused until Golden exact control is reconfirmed.

next_experiment.name: B3_GOLDEN_EXACT_REGEN
next_experiment.purpose: Regenerate the Golden Baseline gate=16 / x=16 candidate using the safe Prompt1-Prompt6 process to reconfirm the 0.86 reference.
